title: Context Menu

statement.markdown:
title: Context Menu
text: Create a context menu that appears when you right-click on a div element. The context menu should have several options: New File, New Folder, Rename, and Delete. Each option should have a description and a corresponding action.
requirements
1. The context menu should be displayed when you right-click on a div element.
2. The context menu should have a minimum of 4 options: New File, New Folder, Rename, and Delete.
3. Each option should have a description and a corresponding action.
4. The menu should be hidden when the user clicks outside of it.
5. The menu should be hidden when the user clicks on one of the options.
6. The context menu should be styled with Tailwind CSS classes.

constraints: The context menu should be displayed in the same position as the right-click event.
The context menu should not be displayed if the user clicks on an element that has a class of 'context-menu-hidden'.
The context menu should not be displayed if the user clicks on an element that has a class of 'context-menu-disabled'.
